features: Vo5 Matt Styling Paste for men easily shapes your hair with rework able hold and a matt finish with no stickiness
With the hold level of 5/5, this Vo5 hair paste is a great ally in your daily battle with your hair. It gives you the undone texture with the rework able firm hold
Vo5 men's hair products help create an extreme style for everyone - this hair styling paste is great for mid-length cuts
If you like the undone matt texture with the firm hold you can be confident that the Vo5 hair paste gives you the control you need to keep your hair in check and rework all day long
Great news - our Matt Paste is easy to work in and wash out. You can get your extreme style messy look with no extra mess
At Vo5 we believe men's styling shouldn’t be dull, life shouldn’t be boring and you should never restrict your self-expression
description: Product Description Use Vo5 Matt Styling Paste for man allows you to shape your hair effortlessly to create the undone matt texture with a rework able hold. The hair paste is great for mid-length cuts and easy to work in and wash out. So you can create your extreme messy style with no mess. The Matt Paste keeps your hair in check, giving you control all day long. Improvise with our Vo5 Matt Styling Paste to create either daytime or evening styles. For best results: On first use, press pump several times to dispense the hair styling paste. Apply on damp or dry hair. Work a small amount of paste between your hands and rough up your hair using your palms, then use your fingertips to add definition where needed. Style Tip: For an extra choppy, separated look, work paste through your hair at the roots with your fingertips. At Vo5 we believe hair shouldn’t be dull, life shouldn’t be boring and you should never restrict your self-expression. If you liked Vo5 Matt Styling Paste, be sure to check out the other Vo5 styling products in the full range to remix your style and experiment with your hair even further. Don’t forget to leave a product review and share your very best hair styling tips and tricks. Vo5: for hair play whatever your style. Beat Hair Boredom with Vo5. For more style and music inspiration, follow Vo5 on social. Ingredients Aqua Lanolin Cera Stearic Acid Cera Microcristallina Bentonite Paraffinum Liquidum Paraffin Cera Alba Propylene Glycol Alcohol Denat. Steareth-21 Kaolin PEG-20 Hydrogenated Lanolin Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride Vinyl Caprolactam/VP/Dimethylaminoethyl Methacrylate Copolymer Polyvinylcaprolactam Glyceryl Stearate PEG-100 Stearate Triethanolamine Disodium EDTA Parfum Diazolidinyl Urea Methylparaben ,Citronellol Geraniol Hexyl Cinnamal Limonene Linalool Directions On first use, press pump several times to dispense product. Apply on damp or dry hair. Work a small amount of paste between your hands and rough up your hair using your palms, then use your fingertips to add definition where needed. STYLE TIP: For an extra choppy, separated look, work paste through your hair at the roots with your fingertips. Box Contains 6 x VO5 Extreme Style Matt Paste, 100 ml See more
